nasb.text: In the mouth of the foolish is a rod for his back, But the lips of the wise will protect them.

esv.text: By the mouth of a fool comes a rod for his back, but the lips of the wise will preserve them.

cnv.text: 愚妄人的口中長出驕傲的枝子； 智慧人的嘴唇，能保障自己。

ccb.text: 愚人的狂言招来鞭打， 智者的唇舌保护自己。

csbs.text: 愚妄人的口招来背上的刑杖； 智慧人的嘴保守自己。
